subject: Do you know a physicist at a top UK or US University?
body:
Apologies for the mass e-mail, I hope it finds you well.

We need an introduction to a top physicist who can validate groundbreaking
technology for the treatment of fibromyalgia, arthiritis and various other
ailments. We have a physics professor on board already who can explain the
machine but we want a top University to put their name to it so that the
treatment can be available to the public a soon as possible.

There have been countless cases where ailments have been treated
successfully and quickly. Can you help?

Many thanks.
body_html:
Apologies for the mass e-mail, I hope it finds you well.
 
We need an introduction to a top physicist who can validate groundbreaking technology for the treatment of fibromyalgia, arthiritis and various other ailments. We have a physics professor on board already who can explain the machine but we want a top University to put their name to it so that the treatment can be available to the public a soon as possible.
 
There have been countless cases where ailments have been treated successfully and quickly. Can you help?
 
Many thanks.
